title: Player Health Indicators Unofficial
description: Displays a health bar above players
body:
**This is an unofficial version of the original mod made by [Gaider10](https://modrinth.com/user/Gaider10).**  
It brings the same functionality to newer Minecraft versions.

A simple and lightweight mod that displays other players' health above their names in hearts. Easily see how much health everyone has at a glance!

## Features
- **Toggleable:** Set a keybind in controls to turn the health bars on or off.  
- **Clear display:** Health is shown above players in **heart icons**.  
- **Compatible with new Minecraft versions** (1.21+)  

Enjoy the classic **Player Health Indicators** experience in the latest versions of Minecraft — now available unofficially.
